lesson.menu_desc: Describe people you know: tall, short, young, hair, friendly, kind, funny, smart -- be for appearance and have for features -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Describing People: Appearance & Personality
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 11 -- Describing People

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Carla. Let me tell you about my best friend. Her name is Bia. She is young and tall. She has long brown hair and beautiful eyes. Bia is very friendly and kind. She is always happy, and she is funny too. When I am sad, she helps me. Bia is also smart: she works in a hospital, and she is a good nurse. I am lucky because Bia is my friend.

Hello, I am Marcos. I want to describe my brother. His name is Paulo. Paulo is older than me. He is short, and he has short black hair and a beard. Paulo is not tall, but he is very strong. People say he is serious, but I know he is funny and kind. He is also very smart. Paulo is an engineer, and he likes his job. My brother is a good person, and I am proud of him.

extra_audio.text: First, I look at the person. Second, I describe the hair: she has long brown hair. Third, I describe the face: she has green eyes. Fourth, I describe the body: she is tall. Fifth, I describe the personality: she is friendly and kind.
